title: Preregistered Korean and English intent-detection corpus

preregistration.purpose: Static acceptance material for a future intent-detection measurement.
preregistration.mutationPolicy: Add new cases through a new preregistration; do not relabel existing cases after evaluation.

cases.prompt: 사용자 프로필에서 표시 이름을 바꾸는 API를 추가해 줘.
cases.rationale: A concrete feature request asks to add a product capability.

cases.prompt: 관리자가 비활성 계정을 다시 활성화할 수 있는 화면과 API를 만들어 줘.
cases.rationale: The request names a new user-visible capability.

cases.prompt: Add an endpoint that lets a user change their display name.
cases.rationale: The user asks for a concrete new endpoint.

cases.prompt: Build a small admin flow for reactivating disabled accounts.
cases.rationale: The request is to build a product feature.

cases.prompt: README에 계정 삭제 요청은 30일 유예 후 처리한다고 되어 있어. 그 요구사항을 구현해 줘.
cases.rationale: The prompt asks to act on a requirement referenced in README.

cases.prompt: README의 오류 응답 형식 규칙에 맞게 주문 API를 정리해 줘.
cases.rationale: A repository requirement is named as the implementation source.

cases.prompt: Implement the README requirement that account deletion has a 30-day grace period.
cases.rationale: The README is explicitly supplied as the requirements source.

cases.prompt: Update the order API to follow the error-response contract in README.md.
cases.rationale: The requested change is constrained by a named repository requirement.

cases.prompt: 요구사항: 주문 취소는 배송 시작 전까지만 가능하고, 취소 사유를 남겨야 해. 이 기능을 추가해 줘.
cases.rationale: The user pastes concrete acceptance requirements for a new capability.

cases.prompt: 다음 규칙을 구현해 줘: 이메일 변경 요청에는 확인 링크가 필요하고 링크는 24시간 뒤 만료된다.
cases.rationale: The prompt supplies explicit behavior rules to implement.

cases.prompt: Requirement: an order can be cancelled only before shipment starts, and the cancellation reason must be stored. Add it.
cases.rationale: The prompt includes concrete acceptance requirements.

cases.prompt: Implement these rules: changing an email sends a confirmation link that expires after 24 hours.
cases.rationale: The requested work is defined by pasted requirements.

cases.prompt: 현재 결제 서비스에서 환불 완료 이벤트가 두 번 발행돼. 한 번만 발행되도록 수정해 줘.
cases.rationale: This requests a change to existing project behavior.

cases.prompt: 기존 회원 검색 API에 조직 ID 필터를 추가해 줘.
cases.rationale: The prompt modifies a named existing API.

cases.prompt: The payment service emits the refund-completed event twice. Change it so it emits once.
cases.rationale: The request changes observed behavior in the existing project.

cases.prompt: Add an organization ID filter to the existing member-search API.
cases.rationale: The prompt asks to change an identified existing surface.

cases.prompt: 비밀번호 재설정 링크가 만료 후에도 열려. 만료 검사를 고쳐 줘.
cases.rationale: A concrete defect and desired correction are provided.

cases.prompt: 빈 장바구니로 결제하면 500이 나와. 사용자 오류 응답으로 바꿔 줘.
cases.rationale: The request identifies an error condition to fix.

cases.prompt: Password-reset links still open after expiration. Fix the expiration check.
cases.rationale: The prompt identifies a specific defect and desired correction.

cases.prompt: Checkout returns a 500 for an empty cart. Return a user error instead.
cases.rationale: The request is a bounded bug fix.

cases.prompt: 알림 목록에 읽음 여부 필터와 페이지네이션을 추가해 줘.
cases.rationale: The prompt expands an existing product feature.

cases.prompt: 파일 업로드 기능에 PDF 미리보기와 삭제 기능을 더해 줘.
cases.rationale: The user asks for additional capability on an existing feature.

cases.prompt: Add read-status filtering and pagination to the notifications list.
cases.rationale: The request expands an existing feature.

cases.prompt: Extend file uploads with PDF previews and a delete action.
cases.rationale: The prompt asks to add capability to an existing surface.

cases.prompt: 이 프로젝트의 인증 흐름이 어떻게 동작하는지 설명해 줘.
cases.rationale: The user asks only for an explanation.

cases.prompt: Spring에서 트랜잭션 전파 옵션이 무엇인지 알려 줘.
cases.rationale: This is a general technical question without requested work.

cases.prompt: 왜 이 서비스가 clean architecture를 쓰는지 요약해 줘.
cases.rationale: The request is for a summary, not implementation.

cases.prompt: Explain how authentication works in this project.
cases.rationale: The user asks only for an explanation.

cases.prompt: What does transaction propagation mean in Spring?
cases.rationale: This is a general question with no requested change.

cases.prompt: 지금 배포 준비 상태를 알려 줘.
cases.rationale: The prompt asks for current status only.

cases.prompt: 테스트가 모두 통과하는지 확인해 줘.
cases.rationale: The request is an observation or verification request, not entry.

cases.prompt: What is the current release-readiness status?
cases.rationale: The user asks for status only.

cases.prompt: Check whether the test suite is passing.
cases.rationale: This asks for verification rather than implementation entry.

cases.prompt: Give me a short update on the current worktree.
cases.rationale: The request is a progress update only.

cases.prompt: 이 변경사항을 코드 리뷰해 줘.
cases.rationale: The user asks for review rather than new implementation.

cases.prompt: 이 PR에서 위험한 회귀가 있는지 찾아 줘.
cases.rationale: This is a review request.

cases.prompt: 테스트 커버리지의 빈 곳만 검토해 줘.
cases.rationale: The request is limited to assessment.

cases.prompt: Review this change for regressions.
cases.rationale: The user requests review, not implementation.

cases.prompt: Check this pull request for missing tests only.
cases.rationale: The request asks for an assessment only.

cases.prompt: 현재 브랜치의 최근 커밋 세 개를 보여 줘.
cases.rationale: The request is limited to Git history.

cases.prompt: 이 변경사항만 커밋해 줘.
cases.rationale: The user asks for a Git operation only.

cases.prompt: Show the last three commits on this branch.
cases.rationale: The request is limited to Git history.

cases.prompt: Create a branch for the current change.
cases.rationale: The request is a repository operation only.

cases.prompt: Squash the last two commits.
cases.rationale: The user requests Git history manipulation only.

cases.prompt: 이거 잘 되게 해 줘.
cases.rationale: No target, behavior, or artifact is specified.

cases.prompt: 가입 부분을 좀 개선해 줘.
cases.rationale: The requested outcome is too underspecified to route.

cases.prompt: Make this work better.
cases.rationale: The target and desired behavior are unspecified.

cases.prompt: Improve the signup part.
cases.rationale: The request lacks enough scope to select an entry route.
